title: Code constant diverging from formal spec
description: Change a code constant to diverge from the formal specification value

mutation.description: Change mapped code value to diverge from formal

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect C->F constant divergence

title: Require of nonexistent module
description: Add a require() for a module that doesn't exist — runtime import error

mutation.description: Add require('./nonexistent-module.cjs') at top of file

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect failing tests due to broken import

title: Broken fail-open hook error handling
description: Remove error handling from a fail-open hook path, breaking the fail-open contract

mutation.description: Remove try/catch wrapper around main logic

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect broken fail-open contract via tests

title: Typo in module export name
description: Introduce a typo in a module.exports key, breaking downstream consumers

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect downstream test failures

title: Function signature change without caller update
description: Change a function signature without updating callers — C->E churn

mutation.description: Add required parameter to filterRequirementsByFocus function

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect test failures from signature change

title: New bin module without requirement tracing
description: Add a new .cjs file in bin/ with no requirement traceability — C->R gap

mutation.description: Create utility module with no @req annotations

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect C->R gap for untraced module

title: Hardcoded secret in source
description: Add a hardcoded API key or URL that should be in config

mutation.description: Add hardcoded API endpoint URL constant

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect hardcoded secret or security issue

title: Circular require dependency
description: Create a circular require() dependency between two modules

mutation.description: Add circular require to solve-cycle-detector.cjs which already requires this

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect circular dependency or resulting test failures

title: Return type change breaking structural tests
description: Change a pure function's return type from object to array

mutation.description: Change appendTrendEntry to return array instead of object

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect test failures from return type mismatch

title: New CLI flag without docs update
description: Add a new CLI flag to the solver without updating help text or docs

mutation.description: Add --bench-test flag parsing without documenting it

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect R->D gap for undocumented feature

title: Off-by-one in quorum fan-out
description: Introduce an off-by-one error in the quorum fan-out calculation

mutation.description: Change fan-out boundary condition from < to <=

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect behavioral regression via tests

title: Invalid circuit breaker threshold
description: Change circuit breaker threshold to an invalid value (negative or zero)

mutation.description: Set default threshold to 0 or negative

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect invalid threshold via tests or C->F divergence

title: Rate-limit semaphore deadlock
description: Modify rate-limit file semaphore logic to create a deadlock scenario

mutation.description: Change semaphore acquire to never release

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect deadlock via timeout in tests

title: Adapter not conforming to MachineIR schema
description: Add a new adapter in bin/adapters/ that doesn't conform to the MachineIR schema

mutation.description: Create adapter returning invalid IR structure

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect adapter schema violation via adapter tests

title: Timing bug in convergence cycle detection
description: Introduce a subtle timing bug in the convergence loop's cycle detection algorithm

mutation.description: Change cycle window comparison from >= to > causing missed oscillation

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect regression in cycle detection via tests
